series_metadata.series_title: Form U-2/U-2A, Consent to Service of Process
series_metadata.series_description: These records consist of Consents to Service of Process Filed in conjunction with Registration related filings.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy documents shall be retained in operating area for a period of 8 years from the date of filing. After 8 years, or scanned and verified records are to be destroyed. ; Electronic: Records maintenance to coincide with paper documents and destruction by erasure., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
